eve.name: EVE

findings: 8/8 modeled; crit-count nuke + Mk2 doubling confirmed. F3 reload refund grants 4 rounds not 3 + drops Electric-target gate. Crit-count proxy hitCount 59 (stale under external crit)

eve.evidence: Pure model — audit/review language only, not fight-validated
caveats: skill1: Unstable Energy cadence (hitCount 59) assumes 75% crit at scope lock (44 crit hits / 0.75 = 58.67); external crit-rate buffs on eve would shorten the real cadence — the static threshold cannot respond.

skill1: Damage Taken ▲10% is modeled as permanent while the boss is Electric (kit: 10s per Unstable Energy hit on an Electric target; ~full uptime after the first proc at ~4.9s, so the approximation over-credits only the opening seconds).

skill2: the 3-round reload refund is modeled unconditionally (kit gates it on hitting an ELECTRIC target — it should be inert vs non-Electric bosses) and as 5% of BUFFED max ammo (engine rounds 75×0.05 to 4 rounds vs the kit's flat 3).

burst: Mk2's Unstable Energy doubling uses sequentialDamagePct +100 in the shared Damage-Up bucket — a TRUE ×2 solo, but dilutes below ×2 whenever other Damage-Up-bucket buffs are live (accepted ⚑). The burst nuke itself carries no sequential flavor: kit tags it sequential, but flavoring it would also let Mk2 double the nuke, which the kit does NOT say.
